title: Blossom & Bewitchment: Farmstead
description: Step into a world where nature and magic intertwine!
body:
Minecraft modpack that blossoms with peaceful farm life, gentle magic, and adorable new companions. Build your perfect countryside surrounded by vibrant rose fields, raise crops, and tame loyal fox friends and adorable new dog breeds to journey by your side. As you grow your farm, unlock simple, enchanting magic to help you protect your homestead. Explore a world full of cute, friendly mobs, soft adventures, and dreamlike days in this heartwarming farm-life experience. 🌿🦊🐶🌸✨ mod total : 61 

🌿 Exploration & Nature

1. Wilderness – Adds survival mechanics, immersive world-building, and environmental challenges.
2. Wilder Wilds – Expands flora and trees, enhances biome diversity and seasonal ambience.
3. WilderNature – Adds realistic plants, environmental detail, and foliage variety.
4. Missing Wilds – Fills in gaps in biome design with new plants and visuals.
5. Swampier Swamps – Overhauls swamp biomes with lush visuals, mud blocks, and new vegetation.
6. YUNG’s API + Addons:
   - Better Strongholds, Caves, Mineshafts, Nether, End, Witch Huts, etc.**
   - Enhances world generation with immersive, lore-friendly structures.

✨ Magic & Enchantments

7. Botania – A natural magic tech mod using flowers and mana for automation and spellcasting.
8. Vein Mining Enchant Book – Adds an enchantment for vein mining ores and blocks, no need for mods like Ore Excavation.

🏡 Farming & Livestock

9. Farmer’s Delight + Addons – Deepens food and cooking mechanics with new crops, tools, and recipes.
10. Hamsters Mod – Adds tameable, adorable hamsters as pets.
11. Guinea Pigs Mod – Adds guinea pigs with various breeds and behaviors for fun and companionship.

🧭 Utility & World Interaction

12. Waystones – Teleportation system using placeable waystones; great for navigation and fast travel.
13. Xaero’s Map+ – Adds a mini-map and full world map with waypoint support and terrain detail.
14. Tree Harvester – Chop down entire trees by breaking one block (configurable).

🌌 Aesthetic & Interface

15. Dynamic Lights – Light-emitting items like torches glow when held or dropped.
16. Starry GUI – Replaces the vanilla UI with a more atmospheric, starry-themed design.

🤝 World & NPC Interaction

17. Friends and Foes – Adds mobs based on past Minecraft Mob Vote candidates, along with new features and interactions.
18. MCA Reborn (Minecraft Comes Alive) – Replaces vanilla villagers with interactive NPCs, players can build relationships, marry, start families, and shape village life.
